claim: Q1. Agentic workflow state significantly increases State View size
evidence: Agentic Rich avg = 7713 B vs Coarse 346 B = 22.3x

claim: Q2. State maintenance cost scales with N x S x f
evidence: N=4 Rich = 640 KB/s; N=256 Rich = 298263 KB/s (466x at 64x N)
notes: Scaling observed but bandwidth is dominated by f and view serialization, not just N

claim: Q3. Coarse lacks workflow-affinity / prefix-locality signals
notes: Sketch captures partial affinity; full gap only seen with stronger workload

claim: Q4. Rich state improves dispatch quality (cache hit)
notes: Sketch vs Rich: Δ = +6.5pp (Sketch is comparable or better)

claim: Q5. Rich state imposes higher state maintenance overhead
evidence: Rich 7713 B vs Coarse 346 B = 22.3x cost

claim: Q6. Sketch achieves near-Rich quality with near-Coarse overhead
evidence: Sketch cache hit = 83.4%, Rich 76.9%, Coarse 67.6%. Sketch cost = 1.04x Coarse, Rich = 22.3x Coarse
